questions.text: Does the system have documentation that explains in detail its category according to those defined in the AI Act?
Do the management systems (quality, risk or human supervision) of the smart system have training procedures to ensure that those responsible for the system are aware of the EU's fundamental rights?
Do the management systems (quality, risk and/or human supervision) of the intelligent system have procedures that allow the notification of serious incidents to be managed?
questions.category: Frame the notification of major incidents in management systems (MG03)

questions.text: Does the information associated with the system include contact information for your corresponding MSA?
Has the Provider provided the Deployer with a contact channel to report major incidents in this case?
